      have h₄ : x * (7 / 6 : ℝ) = 1 := h₁
      have h₅ : x = 1 / (7 / 6 : ℝ) := by
        field_simp at h₄ ⊢
        <;> nlinarith
      exact h₅
    norm_num at h₃ ⊢
    <;> linarith
  exact h₂

have h₁ : x = 6 / 7 := by
    norm_num at h₀ ⊢
    <;>
    (try norm_num at h₀ ⊢) <;>
    (try linarith) <;>
    (try ring_nf at h₀ ⊢) <;>
    (try nlinarith) <;>
    (try field_simp at h₀ ⊢) <;>
    (try nlinarith) <;>
    (try linarith)
    <;>
    nlinarith
  exact h₁

have h₁ : x = 6 / 7 := by
    have h₂ : x * (1 / 2 + 2 / 3) = 1 := h₀
    have h₃ : x * (7 / 6) = 1 := by
      norm_num at h₂ ⊢
      <;> linarith
    have h₄ : x = 6 / 7 := by
      apply_fun (fun x => x * (6 / 7)) at h₃
      ring_nf at h₃ ⊢
      <;> linarith
    exact h₄
  exact h₁
